tier_1.title: Tidal Crossing
tier_1.description: The trail crosses a tidal flat. Water is already creeping in.
tier_1.success: You time the crossing perfectly. Boots stay dry.
tier_1.failure: Caught by the tide. Hours waiting for it to recede.

tier_1.title: Fishing Village
tier_1.description: A cluster of huts on stilts. Nets hang drying in the salt wind.
tier_1.success: The fishers share smoked fish and directions.
tier_1.failure: Abandoned. The smell of old fish is the only greeting.

tier_1.title: Sahuagin Scouts
tier_1.description: Scaled figures emerge from the surf, tridents gleaming.
tier_1.success: You spot their heads in the waves and move inland before they strike.

tier_2.title: Storm Surge
tier_2.description: A wall of grey water races toward the coastal path.
tier_2.success: You scramble to high ground just in time.
tier_2.failure: Swept off the path. Gear soaked, supplies ruined.

tier_2.title: Shipwreck
tier_2.description: A merchant vessel lies broken on the rocks, cargo spilling from its hold.
tier_2.success: You salvage intact provisions from the wreck.
tier_2.failure: Nothing but barnacles and rotting wood.
